categories.category_electrical_repairing_desc: Expert electrical repairs, wiring, and installations for a safe and functional home.
categories.category_carpentry_desc: Professional woodworking, furniture repair, and custom carpentry solutions for your home.
categories.category_cleaning_desc: Comprehensive home cleaning services, from regular maintenance to deep sanitization.
categories.category_gardening_desc: Expert lawn care, landscaping, and plant maintenance to keep your garden beautiful.
categories.category_painting_desc: Quality interior and exterior painting services to refresh and protect your home's surfaces.
categories.category_plumbing_desc: Reliable plumbing repairs, leak detection, and fixture installations by skilled professionals.

service_names.service_regular_house_cleaning_desc: Professional home cleaning for daily maintenance, keeping your living spaces fresh and hygienic at all times. Our trained cleaners handle dusting all surfaces, sweeping and mopping floors, wiping down countertops, and sanitizing commonly touched areas. We use safe, effective cleaning agents and follow a systematic checklist so nothing gets overlooked. Whether you need weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly visits, we tailor the schedule to your lifestyle. Regular cleaning reduces allergens and dust buildup, making it the easiest way to maintain a healthy home all year round.
service_names.service_deep_home_cleaning_desc: An intensive, top-to-bottom cleaning that goes far beyond routine maintenance to restore your home to its best condition. Our crew tackles areas often neglected during regular cleaning, including behind appliances, inside cabinets, under furniture, and along baseboards and ceiling corners. We use professional-grade equipment and eco-friendly solutions that are tough on grime but safe for your household. Kitchen surfaces, bathroom tiles, and grout lines get special treatment to remove buildup and staining. Expect your home to look and feel completely refreshed when we are done.
service_names.service_sofa_cleaning_desc: Professional deep cleaning for sofas and upholstered furniture to remove dirt, allergens, and stubborn stains that regular vacuuming cannot fully address. Our technicians use hot water extraction and foam-based methods tailored to different fabric types including velvet, linen, microfiber, and leather. Eco-friendly, non-toxic cleaning agents ensure your furniture is safe for children and pets after treatment. We deodorize the upholstery to eliminate lingering odors and restore the original texture of the fabric wherever possible. Regular sofa cleaning extends the lifespan of your upholstery and keeps your living space truly hygienic.
service_names.service_water_tank_cleaning_desc: Complete sanitization and cleaning of overhead and underground water storage tanks to ensure your household has access to clean, safe water at all times. Our certified team drains the tank fully, removes all sludge and debris, and scrubs the interior walls with WHO-approved disinfectants before a high-pressure rinse. We also inspect for cracks, leaks, or structural issues and issue a cleaning certificate on completion. Both single and multi-compartment tanks of any size are serviced. Regular tank cleaning every six to twelve months is recommended to protect your family's health.
service_names.service_move_in_move_out_cleaning_desc: A comprehensive cleaning service designed to prepare a property for new occupants or restore it to pristine condition before vacating. Kitchens, bathrooms, floors, windows, and all fixtures are cleaned thoroughly from top to bottom following a detailed property-specific checklist. We also handle walls, switches, skirting boards, and door frames that are often missed during routine cleaning. Our team meets landlord and real estate handover standards reliably. The service can be scheduled flexibly around your moving timeline, including weekends.
service_names.service_pipe_leak_repair_desc: Fast, reliable repair of leaking pipes, joints, and fittings to prevent water damage and costly structural issues in your home. Our licensed plumbers accurately diagnose the source of the leak and carry out repairs using high-quality fittings, sealants, and pipe materials suited to your existing plumbing. Where necessary, we replace corroded or damaged pipe sections rather than applying temporary fixes. Emergency leak repair appointments are available for urgent situations. Post-repair pressure testing confirms the fix is fully watertight before we leave.
service_names.service_drain_blockage_removal_desc: Professional removal of stubborn drain and sewer blockages to restore proper water flow throughout your home's plumbing system. Our plumbers use high-pressure water jetting and mechanical drain snaking to clear blockages in kitchen sinks, bathroom drains, floor drains, toilets, and main sewer lines. Our methods are safe for all pipe materials, unlike chemical drain cleaners that can cause corrosion over time. Once cleared, we flush and test the drain to confirm full restoration. We also advise on preventive habits to minimize the risk of future blockages.
service_names.service_tap_installation_desc: Expert installation of new taps, faucets, and mixers for kitchens, bathrooms, and utility areas with precision and care. Our plumbers work with all major tap types and ensure a secure, leak-free fit by properly sealing connections and testing water pressure and flow after installation. We can also advise on the best tap styles and finishes to complement your sink or countertop. All work complies with local plumbing standards for safety and durability. Get a perfectly functioning, great-looking tap installed without the hassle.
service_names.service_commode_repair_service_desc: Comprehensive repair service for toilets and commodes experiencing flushing problems, leaks, continuously running water, or structural damage. Our plumbers diagnose the root cause and carry genuine replacement parts to resolve most issues in a single visit. Repairs cover faulty flush valves, damaged fill valves, worn flappers, cracked cisterns, loose connections, and broken flush handles. Thorough testing after every repair ensures the toilet flushes cleanly and fills correctly. Restore comfort and hygiene to your bathroom with a professional commode repair.
service_names.service_bathtub_leak_repair_desc: Specialized repair service to detect and fix leaks in bathtubs, surrounding tiles, overflow drains, and supply connections before water damage spreads to the subfloor or ceiling below. Our technicians inspect the entire tub assembly and apply the right repair method, whether re-caulking, replacing the drain assembly, regrouting tiles, or fixing supply line fittings. High-quality waterproof sealants and grout are used to ensure a long-lasting, watertight finish. The surrounding area is dried and treated to prevent mold or mildew from developing. Stop the damage at the source and enjoy a fully functional, leak-free bathtub.
service_names.service_wiring_repair_desc: Safe and professional repair of faulty electrical wiring in homes and commercial spaces by licensed electricians. Our team conducts a thorough inspection to identify short circuits, broken wires, loose connections, and overloaded circuits, then repairs using certified materials that comply with national safety codes. All exposed or damaged insulation is replaced, and wiring routes are checked for correct load distribution. After the repair, we test all affected circuits with professional equipment to confirm safe operation. Trust your home's electrical system to professionals who prioritize your safety above all.
service_names.service_switch_socket_replacement_desc: Quick and safe replacement of worn, damaged, or outdated electrical switches and sockets by qualified electricians. Faulty switches that spark or feel hot and sockets that are loose or cracked are fire hazards that should be replaced promptly. We stock a range of types including single and double sockets, USB-integrated units, dimmer switches, and weatherproof outdoor sockets. All replacements are done with secure wire terminations, correct earthing, and tested for polarity and insulation resistance before sign-off. Upgrade your switches and sockets for better safety, reliability, and a modern look.
service_names.service_ceiling_fan_repair_desc: Professional repair of ceiling fans experiencing wobbling, noise, slow speed, electrical faults, or complete failure to operate. Our electricians diagnose the issue thoroughly, checking the motor, capacitor, blade brackets, speed control switch, and wiring connections. Common problems like humming sounds or speed reduction are often resolved by replacing the capacitor or securing loose contacts. Blade balancing, lubrication, and mounting fixture checks are carried out as needed for smooth, safe operation. Restore comfortable airflow in your home with a thoroughly repaired and safely functioning ceiling fan.
service_names.service_inverter_installation_desc: Complete installation of home or office inverter systems to provide reliable backup power during outages and load shedding. Our electricians assess your power requirements and handle the full installation, including mounting the unit, connecting the battery bank, wiring the changeover circuit, and integrating with your distribution board. Safety features including overload protection, short-circuit cutoff, and low battery shutdown are all tested and verified. We explain how to operate and maintain the system to maximize battery lifespan. Enjoy uninterrupted power at home or work with a professionally installed inverter system.
service_names.service_ac_installation_setup_desc: Professional installation and commissioning of split air conditioning units, cassette systems, and window ACs by certified technicians. Our team handles wall bracket mounting, outdoor compressor placement, refrigerant line routing, and electrical connection to a dedicated circuit, following all manufacturer specifications. Drainage pipes are correctly routed and the system is tested across all modes before handover. Remote control pairing, temperature calibration, and timer settings are configured as needed. Beat the heat with a correctly installed air conditioning system that performs at its best from day one.
service_names.service_door_window_painting_desc: Professional painting of doors and windows to refresh their appearance, protect the surfaces, and extend their lifespan. Our painters begin with thorough surface preparation including sanding, scraping off old paint, filling cracks, and applying primer before using high-quality paints suited to wood, metal, or UPVC surfaces. Multiple coats are applied evenly for a smooth, durable finish that resists chipping and weather damage. Protective masking keeps glass panes and hardware paint-free throughout the process. Transform your home's appearance and protect your woodwork with a professional door and window painting service.
service_names.service_paint_touch_up_spot_repair_desc: Targeted paint touch-up and spot repair service to address scuffs, scratches, stains, damp patches, and minor wall damage without the need for full room repainting. Our painters prepare each damaged area by cleaning, sanding, and applying filler or sealant, then match the existing paint color and finish as closely as possible. Touch-ups are blended carefully into the surrounding surface to minimize visibility. Water stains and damp patches are treated with stain-blocking primer before painting to prevent bleed-through. Restore your walls to a clean, fresh appearance with precision touch-up work.
service_names.service_room_painting_service_desc: Full interior room painting service to completely transform the look and feel of any room in your home or office. Walls are prepared by cleaning, sanding, filling cracks, and priming before we apply two or more coats of premium interior paint in your chosen color and finish. Ceilings, cornices, and skirting boards are painted to complement the walls for a cohesive, polished result. Our team works systematically to ensure even coverage, clean edges, and no paint bleed onto trim or adjacent surfaces. Enjoy a beautifully painted room that reflects your style and adds value to your home.
service_names.service_exterior_house_painting_service_: Comprehensive exterior painting service to protect and beautify the outside of your home against weathering, moisture, and UV damage. All surfaces are pressure-washed, scraped, sanded, and primed before we apply exterior-grade, weather-resistant paints formulated for durability in local conditions. Masonry, plasterwork, timber cladding, fascias, soffits, and gutters are all handled by our skilled painters. Safety scaffolding is used where required to reach upper floors efficiently and safely. Give your home a striking, well-protected exterior that stands up to the elements for years to come.
service_names.service_lawn_mowing_service_desc: Professional lawn mowing and grass cutting service to keep your garden neat, healthy, and well-maintained throughout the growing season. Our gardeners arrive with commercial-grade mowers set to the correct cutting height, mowing in even patterns and edging along pathways, driveways, and garden borders for a crisp finish. Grass clippings are collected or mulched back into the lawn, and debris is cleared before and after mowing. Our team can visit weekly or fortnightly to keep your lawn consistently in great condition. Enjoy a lush, well-kept lawn without the time and effort of doing it yourself.
service_names.service_plant_trimming_pruning_desc: Expert trimming and pruning of garden plants, shrubs, hedges, and small trees to promote healthy growth and maintain an attractive, well-shaped garden. Our gardeners use sharp, clean tools to make precise cuts at the correct growth points, removing dead, damaged, or crossing branches to improve airflow and reduce the risk of disease. Hedges are trimmed to clean, consistent shapes, and flowering plants are deadheaded at the right time of year for more abundant blooming. All cuttings and green waste are gathered and removed from the garden on completion. Keep your garden healthy, vibrant, and beautifully shaped with regular professional pruning.
service_names.service_flower_shrub_planting_desc: Professional planting of flowers, shrubs, and ornamental plants to bring color, life, and character to your garden or outdoor space. Our gardeners prepare the soil, position each plant thoughtfully for spacing, height, and color harmony, and plant at the correct depth to encourage healthy establishment. After planting, we water thoroughly and apply mulch around the base to retain moisture and suppress weeds. We can work from your own plant selection or source suitable varieties on your behalf. Transform your outdoor space into a vibrant, flourishing garden with expert planting by our skilled gardeners.

about.pillar_book_desc: Easy scheduling with clear pricing and flexible payment options.
about.pillar_relax_desc: Reliable service delivery backed by support when you need it.
about.diff_verified_desc: All service providers undergo thorough background checks and verification processes.
about.diff_support_desc: Round-the-clock customer support to assist you whenever you need help.
about.diff_quality_desc: We ensure high-quality services with satisfaction guarantees and easy refunds.
about.diff_pricing_desc: No hidden fees. Clear, upfront pricing for all services with multiple payment options.

contact.faq_1_q: How do I book a service?
contact.faq_1_a: You can book a service by browsing our services page, selecting the service you need, and clicking "Book Now"...
contact.faq_2_a: All service providers on SewaSaathi undergo a thorough verification process including background checks...
contact.faq_3_q: What payment methods do you accept?
contact.faq_3_a: We accept eSewa, bank transfers, and cash on delivery (COD).
contact.faq_4_a: Yes, up to 24 hours before the scheduled service.
contact.faq_5_a: Contact support within 48 hours for assistance or refund.
contact.faq_6_q: How do I become a provider?
contact.faq_6_a: Click "Become a Provider" in the header and fill out the form.
